description: The LegacyNumericUpDown component comes from Legacy migrated content. This component should not be used in new content, and should be removed when possible.

fields.Color: The color of the UI elements.
fields.Slant: How beveled the UI elements should be.
fields._textSlot: the slot of the text for the number this component is editing.
fields._textRenderer: The text renderer for the number this component is editing.
fields._textEditor: The text editor that allows for direct editing of the number this component is editing.
fields._material: The material this UI is using.
fields._mesh: The mesh this UI is using.
fields._textBounds: The field to drive to make the UI fit around the text.
fields._colliderSize: The field of the collider size for this UI.
fields._meshLeft: The mesh being used by this component's left button.
fields._meshRight: The mesh being used by this component's right button.
fields._textLeftBounds: The field to drive to make the left button stay wrapped around its text.
fields._textRightBounds: The field to drive to make the right button stay wrapped around its text.
fields._leftTextRenderer: The text renderer for the left button.
fields._rightTextRenderer: The text renderer for the right button.
fields._colliderLeftSize: The collider size field of the left button.
fields._colliderRightSize: The collider size field of the right button.
fields._leftOffset: The collider offset field of the left button.
fields._rightOffset: The collider offset field of the right button.
fields._leftTextPosition: The text position field of the left button.
fields._rightTextPosition: The text position field of the right button.
fields.DriveField: The field this component should drive with ``Value``
fields.AllowWriteBack: Whether changes to the value of the field targeted by ``DriveField`` should be written to this component's ``Value`` field instead.
fields.Value: The value that this component currently has for the edited field.
fields.DecimalPoints: How many decimal places this component should keep track of.
fields.IncrementValue: How much to increment or decrement ``Value`` by when pressing the left and right buttons.
fields._textDrive: The string field to drive with the current ``Value`` for the visuals.

methods.EditingStarted: Called when the number field is focused into.
methods.EditingChanged: Called when the number field is changed.
methods.EditingFinished: Called when the number field has stopped being edited.
methods.OnLeftTouched: Called when the left button is touched.
methods.OnRightTouched: Called when the right button is touched.
